CustomField.description: Check if the price should be a fix price or calculated price
CustomField.formula: IF ( Monthly_Partner_Payment_Fixed__c > 0, Monthly_Partner_Payment_Fixed__c, IF (Monthly_Partner_Payment__c > Contracts__r.Payment_Cap__c, Contracts__r.Payment_Cap__c, Monthly_Partner_Payment__c ) )
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The total cost depends on whether it's a Fixed Price contract or Calculated.
CustomField.label: Final Monthly Partner Payment
